articles.title: ​Info Edge among 5 stocks showing bullish RSI upswing
articles.description: On May 26, five Nifty500 stocks that gained over 4% were identified using the RSI Trending Up scan by StockEdge.com. An uptrend signal is generated when the RSI value crosses above 50 from lower levels. “RSI trending up” indicates improving momentum, suggesting strengthening price action and potential bullish continuation, often tracked by traders for buying opportunities.

articles.title: Wall Street is booming, but Americans are pulling back on spending amid inflation pain
articles.description: A growing divide is emerging in the US economy as soaring stock markets benefit wealthier households while rising fuel and grocery prices force millions of Americans to cut back on daily spending.

articles.title: Why do experts see gold trading between ₹1.5–1.8 lakh through 2026?
articles.description: Domestic gold prices in India have surged nearly 20% this year, supported by a weaker rupee and higher customs duties. However, slowing ETF inflows and softer investment sentiment have prompted ICICI Bank to project a consolidation phase, with gold expected to trade between ₹1.5–1.8 lakh per 10 grams through 2026.

articles.title: Stock Market Live Updates Today: BSE Sensex, Nifty50 open flat in trade on mixed global cues; Asian stocks rise
articles.description: Stock Market Live Updates Today: BSE Sensex and Nifty50 saw a muted start to the session on Wednesday. Analysts believe domestic equities could conti

articles.title: Adanis set up largest single-site battery storage outside China
articles.description: Adani Green Energy has commissioned a massive 3.37 GWh battery storage system in Khavda, Gujarat. This is the world's largest single-location battery storage outside China. The project was completed rapidly, enhancing grid reliability and enabling round-the-clock renewable power. Adani Green Energy plans significant future expansion of its battery storage capacity.

articles.title: KEC International secures new orders worth Rs 1,303 cr across businesses
articles.description: KEC International announced that it has secured new orders worth Rs 1,303 crore across multiple business segments, including Transmission & Distribution (T&D), Civil, Renewables, and Cables & Conductors.

articles.title: Petrol, Diesel Prices Remain Elevated on May 27, 2026; Check Rates In Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata & More
articles.description: Fuel prices in major Indian cities remain high due to volatile global crude oil markets. This volatility stems from geopolitical tensions involving Iran and concerns over the Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil shipping route. As a major importer, India is sensitive to these fluctuations.

articles.title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Markets Likely To Open Flat Amid Uncertainty Over US-Iran Deal
articles.description: Sensex Today, Stock Market, Nifty, Share Market Live News Updates

articles.title: Sensex Today | Stock Market Live: GIFT Nifty indicates a flat start; US, Asian markets gain
articles.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit record closing highs on Tuesday, as AI-fueled optimism offset anxiety over Middle ‌East peace talks — concerns that were compounded by recent U.S. strikes on Iran. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 118.02 points, or 0.23%, to 50,461.68, the S&P 500 gained 45.65 points, or 0.61%, to 7,519.12 and the Nasdaq Composite gained 312.21 points, or 1.19%, to 26,656.18.

articles.title: Delhi completes over 95% of Census 2027 houselisting work
articles.description: Census 2027 houselisting in Delhi is over 95% complete, with operations ongoing in 44,435 blocks. The exercise concludes June 15 amid a heatwave.

articles.title: Delhi seeks add’l water from Haryana to maintain Yamuna e-flow
articles.description: Delhi negotiates with Haryana for more water supply via the Munak Canal as the Yamuna dries up, hoping for relief in the next few days.

articles.title: Global Market: BOJ’s Ueda warns oil shocks can trigger lasting inflation if wages and expectations rise
articles.description: Central banks must consider broader economic factors beyond isolated oil price movements, as temporary energy shocks can fuel persistent inflation if they influence wages and pricing behavior. Governor Ueda highlighted that the impact of oil price surges depends on prevailing inflation expectations and wage growth trends, with lessons drawn from Japan's past oil shocks.

articles.title: Hong Kong overtakes Switzerland as world's top cross-border wealth hub on China ties, report shows
articles.description: Hong Kong has surpassed Switzerland as the world's top global booking center for cross-border wealth, reaching $2.95 trillion. This shift is attributed to wealth from China and an IPO boom, with Asian hubs projected to grow faster than European ones. Despite this, Switzerland's diversification and geopolitical stability continue to attract significant assets.

articles.title: Global Market: Japan’s Nikkei seen hitting 69,000 by 2027 amid AI-driven rally
articles.description: Japan's Nikkei index is poised for record highs, with analysts predicting it could reach 69,000 by 2027. This surge is driven by excitement around artificial intelligence and robust corporate profits. Japanese equities have significantly outperformed global markets over the past two years. Despite sharp gains, analysts anticipate some near-term volatility.

articles.title: Sunetra holds party meet amid internal rift
articles.description: NCP's Sunetra Pawar held a meeting amid internal rifts, criticizing BJP for not returning the finance portfolio after Ajit Pawar's death.

articles.title: Puerto Rico's development agency chief resigns after claiming government interference
articles.description: The head of Puerto Rico's key economic development agency announced his resignation on Tuesday as he criticized the U.S. territory's administration of Jenniffer Gonzalez, accusing it of interfering in the department's work.

articles.title: NASA picks Blue Origin, other space firms for moon missions
articles.description: May 26 : NASA awarded contracts to space firms including Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin and Astrolab to send robotic landers, rovers and drones to support the upcoming lunar exploration missions.The U.S. space agency said on Tuesday it had awarded Astrolab $219 million and Lunar Outpost $220 million to build and del

articles.title: How to rebalance mutual funds, FDs & PF investments before retirement? Expert shares roadmap
articles.description: As retirement nears, an investor with a Rs 2.75 crore portfolio needs to rebalance. An expert advises consolidating mutual funds, shifting near-term goals to arbitrage funds, and increasing equity exposure for long-term inflation protection. The strategy aims to simplify investments and enhance returns while managing risk.

articles.title: IREN to buy Blackwell systems from Dell for about $1.6 billion
articles.description: May 26 : Data center operator IREN said on Tuesday it has agreed to buy Nvidia's air-cooled Blackwell systems from Dell for about $1.6 billion, as it aims to bring more capacity online to keep up with soaring AI demand.The deal is to service its previously announced five-year $3.4 billion cloud AI service co

articles.description: Nagpur: A joint surprise inspection by the vigilance departments of South East Central Railway (SECR), Western Coalfields Ltd (WCL), and the CBI Anti-.

articles.title: CM urges power saving amid demand spike
articles.description: UP CM Yogi Adityanath urges judicious power use as demand hits 33,000 MW; says supply is strained but govt working for uninterrupted electricity.

articles.title: Quad gets a boost with key energy, critical minerals and maritime initiatives; condemns attacks on commercial ships
articles.description: Quad gets a boost with key energy, critical minerals and maritime initiatives; condemns attacks on commercial ships

articles.title: ICICI Bank adds most credit cards in April amid rising competition
articles.description: Axis Bank added 63,446 cards in April, less than half its February tally. Kotak Mahindra Bank remained steady at 33,038 additions. "We are focused on growing the business and growing it with the right set of customers in a profitable way," said ICICI Bank Group chief financial officer Anindya Banerjee. "We have been seeing reasonably steady new customer acquisition and would hope to see better numbers in terms of growth."

articles.title: RLD seeks substation upgrade in West UP
articles.description: RLD delegation urges UP govt to upgrade 33/11 kV rural substations in western UP to meet rising demand; energy minister AK Sharma assures prompt action.

articles.title: Improper maintenance likely reason behind Air India aircraft engine fire: DGCA
articles.description: An Air India aircraft made an emergency landing after an engine fire. Preliminary investigations by the DGCA point to improper maintenance. Nuts were reportedly not tightened enough after a nozzle replacement, leading to a fuel leak and fire. The DGCA has ordered checks on all planes with replaced nozzles. This incident raises concerns about maintenance lapses.

articles.title: Sunbird Dispute: HC asks SpiceJet to disclose its assets
articles.description: SpiceJet must reveal its assets to Sunbird France. The lessor seeks payment for unpaid lease rentals and engine maintenance. A UK court ordered SpiceJet to pay $8 million. Sunbird argues SpiceJet faces insolvency with many petitions pending. The airline allegedly paid its chairman advance salary despite owing money to others.

articles.title: A hundred years ago | Laying of new trans-atlantic cable
articles.description: From The Hindu Archives May 27, 1926: The shore end of the greatest submarine cable in the world is to be landed at Land’s End to-day provided weather conditions are favourable.

articles.title: Parliamentary panel reviews Airtel Priority Plan over net neutrality
articles.description: A parliamentary committee is scrutinizing Airtel's priority plan for postpaid customers. The panel is investigating if this service violates net neutrality rules. They are also ensuring prepaid users' service quality is not compromised. Further meetings will be held before a final decision is made on this matter.

articles.title: Tyres maker Matangi Rubber files IPO papers to fund expansion, loan repayment
articles.description: Matangi Rubber IPO | The public issue comprises of fresh issuance of 57.61 lakh shares, and an offer-for-sale of 15.15 lakh shares by existing shareholders.

articles.title: Delhi excise revenue rises five-fold in two decades, crosses Rs 6,300 crore in 2025-26, says report
articles.description: The figures indicate that Delhi’s daily average earnings through excise collections have increased from roughly Rs 3 crore in 2006-07 to more than Rs 17 crore in 2025-26.

articles.title: Sell property, pay zero tax
articles.description: While it might seem almost impossible to save tax after a certain amount, especially when you have made significant long-term capital gains (LTCG). In this video, we decode simple ways to legally pay 0 income tax when selling a property, under both the old and new income tax regimes. Watch to know which income tax section you can use and how.In this video we explain What is LTCG? Section 54 explained Reinvestment timelines ₹10 crore exemption cap Partial reinvestment rule Two-house benefit CGAS option 3-year lock-in catch Who can claim exemption?

articles.title: MSMEs in Karnataka face twin blow amid fuel price rise, minimum wage hike
articles.description: The back-to-back fuel price rise, coupled with the State government’s recent notification raising minimum wages by an average of 60%, has dealt a double blow to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) across the State, industry representatives have said.

articles.title: Stalemate continues over Vishnupad Corridor project
articles.description: The Vishnupad Corridor initiative in Gaya is at an impasse, affecting more than 650 households, with plans to demolish around 400 of them. Residents who deserve fair compensation remain in limbo, while those residing on public parcels face immediate eviction. Although a chance to voice concerns was offered, no objections have been recorded.

articles.title: NSE bars Yes Securities from on boarding new client for three months, imposes 2 lakh penalty
articles.description: Exchange alleged that broking firm repeatedly passed peak and upfront margins to clients, also incorrectly reported peak margins, and failed to execute early pay-in transactions.

articles.title: India just lost to Taiwan because of just one company
articles.description: India just lost its spot as the world’s 5th largest stock market — and one company played an outsized role in the shift.Powered by a sharp AI-led tech rally, Taiwan’s market capitalisation surged to nearly $4.95 trillion, overtaking India’s $4.92 trillion, according to Bloomberg data. The biggest driver? Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC), the chip giant at the centre of the global AI boom.Taiwan now joins the US, mainland China, Japan and Hong Kong as the world’s five largest equity markets

Persistent Systems, Kong join forces to secure enterprise AI scaling
articles.description: The partnership will help enterprises scale AI by unifying connectivity, security, and policy management across diverse systems and workflows.

articles.title: Live: Sensex, Nifty flat in May series; Pharma index top sectoral gainer | Closing Bell
articles.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a volatile session on monthly expiry day as benchmark indices came under selling pressure. The Nifty 50 failed to sustain the 23,900 level, while the Sensex dropped over 500 points, ending around 0.7% lower. Market breadth remained weak, reflecting broad-based caution, although the India VIX continued to cool, indicating easing near-term volatility expectations. Sectorally, financial and realty stocks faced significant pressure, weighing on overall sentiment. However, broader markets showed relative resilience and managed to outperform the benchmarks. On the sectoral front, the metal index emerged as the top gainer, supported by selective buying in commodity-linked stocks. Among Nifty 50 constituents, gainers included Adani Enterprises, Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles (TMPV), and Bajaj Auto, which helped cushion some of the downside. On the losing side, Apollo Hospitals, Titan, and Trent were among the major drags on the index. Overall, the session reflected profit-booking and sectoral rotation amid expiry-led volatility.
